Package index

All functions

keylist() is.keylist() as.keylist() keylist.append()
Create a List With Unique Keys
klist() is.klist() as.klist() `names<-`(<klist>) c(<klist>)
Create a List With Unique Keys (Named or Unnamed)
knlist() is.knlist() as.knlist() `names<-`(<knlist>) c(<knlist>)
Create a List With Unique Named Keys
